description: Brazilian company, risk & public-tender data (CNPJ, CEIS/CNEP, PNCP) as x402-paid agent tools
name: io.github.thomenz/brdata-mcp

environmentVariables.description: 0x private key of a DEDICATED wallet holding USDC on Base (pays per call). Paid tools return 402 without it; the free validate_cnpj tool still works.
environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: base58 or JSON-array secret key of a DEDICATED Solana wallet holding USDC (pays per call). Configure this and/or EVM_PRIVATE_KEY; the x402 layer settles on whichever rail the 402 advertises.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Solana RPC override used to build the payment (e.g. a Helius URL).
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a brdata Worker. Defaults to the hosted production API (https://brdata.thomenz.me).
environmentVariables.name: BRDATA_BASE_URL
